creator: as@cmplx.uk
text:
Created attachment 179278
core.txt file

The panic happened when I switched from a wireless
network to wired ethernet via /etc/rc.d/netif restart,
i.e. from

#ifconfig_em0="DHCP"
wlans_iwm0="wlan0"
ifconfig_wlan0="DHCP WPA"

to

ifconfig_em0="DHCP"
#wlans_iwm0="wlan0"
#ifconfig_wlan0="DHCP WPA"

in /etc/rc.conf

core.txt is attached

Thanks

Anton
